app.name: Belegbar
app.bootError: Belegbar could not start. Please restart the app.

common.notTaxAdvice: All values are estimates. Not tax advice.

nav.privateBody: Your data stays on this device

tooltip.minor: A few unimportant readings are uncertain – no effect on your taxes.
tooltip.warning: Potentially tax-relevant point – please review this document.
tooltip.critical: Real problem – this document does not count towards your totals yet.

overview.dropAria: {{zone}}: drop PDFs here or press Enter to choose files
overview.nonPdf: Only PDF files are supported. Other files were skipped.
overview.noPath: The files could not be read. Please choose them via the file dialog.

documents.title: Documents
documents.copiesSavePartial_one: One document could not be copied.
documents.bulkDeleteConfirmBody: {{count}} documents will be moved to the trash. The PDF files are kept.
documents.bulkDeletePartial_one: One document could not be deleted.
documents.bulkConfirmWarningBody: Contains potentially tax-relevant notes — confirm anyway?
documents.emptyTrashBody: {{count}} documents from all periods and their PDF files will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
documents.emptyTrashBody_one: The trash is cleared across all periods. This document and its PDF file will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
documents.emptyTrashPartial: {{count}} documents could not be permanently deleted.
documents.emptyTrashPartial_one: One document could not be permanently deleted.
documents.empty: No documents for this selection. Add new documents on the Overview screen via drag and drop.
documents.reExtractDone: Re-read finished: {{updated}} updated, {{skipped}} unchanged or skipped.

review.loadFailedBody: Try again, or return to your documents.
review.counterpartyHint: For an {{direction}}, this side is your counterparty.
review.bmfRateScope: Statutory for VAT; for exact profit accounting, prefer the actual EUR settlement rate.
review.missingRateWarning: An exchange rate for {{currency}} is missing. Enter the rate so EUR amounts can be calculated.
review.confirmBlocked: Confirming is not possible yet: this document has critical issues.
review.deleteBody: The document will be moved to the trash. The PDF file is kept and you can restore the document.
review.trashNotice: This document is in the trash. Restore it before editing.
review.filenameHint: The file will be renamed on save, roughly: {{name}}
review.mergeBody: The pages from the matching PDF will be appended to this document. The matching document will then be moved to Trash.
review.mergeSuccess: PDF pages merged. The duplicate was moved to Trash.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.estActualProfit: Recorded business profit to date ({{months}} months)
taxes.estProjectedReserve: Suggested reserve for the whole year
taxes.estProjectionNotice: Whole-year forecast for {{year}}, based on average monthly year-to-date profit across {{months}} calendar months, including the current partial month (annualization factor ×{{factor}}).
taxes.estTaxBaseHint: Taxable income is the amount income tax is calculated from — not profit after tax.
taxes.estTaxBaseExplanation: Income tax is calculated from this tax base. It does not reduce business profit or taxable income.
taxes.estTaxSourceOfficial: Updated from the current official law at gesetze-im-internet.de.
taxes.estTaxSourceBundled: Bundled official annual rule set for offline or historical calculation.
taxes.estSoliSourceOfficial: Updated from the current official SolzG at gesetze-im-internet.de.
taxes.estSoliSourceBundled: Bundled official annual threshold, mitigation zone and statutory 5.5% rate.
taxes.estSoliSourceFallback: The latest available official annual rule is used as a clearly marked fallback.
taxes.estSoliCaveat: Child-allowance effects on the solidarity surcharge are not modeled.
taxes.estChurchCaveat: Church tax does not model child allowances or regional caps.

vatMethodDesc.ist: VAT becomes due when your customer pays.
vatMethodDesc.soll: VAT becomes due on the invoice date.
vatMethodDesc.kleinunternehmer: You don't charge or remit VAT.
vatMethodDesc.unsure: Belegbar calculates cautiously and flags uncertainties.

treatmentDesc.DE_DOMESTIC_7: Domestic revenue with the reduced 7% VAT rate.
treatmentDesc.DE_DOMESTIC_0_EXEMPT: Tax-exempt revenue under §4 UStG (e.g. medical care, teaching).
treatmentDesc.DE_EXPENSE_INPUT_VAT: Expense with German VAT you can deduct as input VAT.
treatmentDesc.DE_EXPENSE_NO_INPUT_VAT: Expense without deductible input VAT (e.g. no VAT shown).
treatmentDesc.EU_B2B_REVERSE_CHARGE_REVENUE: Service to an EU business – the tax liability shifts to the customer.
treatmentDesc.THIRD_COUNTRY_B2B_SERVICE: Service to a business outside the EU – not taxable in Germany.
treatmentDesc.EXPENSE_REVERSE_CHARGE_13B: Expense from abroad – you owe VAT under §13b and usually deduct it as input VAT.
treatmentDesc.KLEINUNTERNEHMER: As a small business you don't charge VAT.
treatmentDesc.UNKNOWN_REVIEW: The classification is unclear and needs your decision.

issues.missing_invoice_date: No invoice date was recognized. Please enter the date manually.
issues.missing_amount: No amount was recognized. Please check the amounts and enter them manually.
issues.conflicting_totals: Net, VAT and gross don't add up. Please check the amounts.
issues.unknown_currency: The currency was not recognized. Please select the correct currency.
issues.non_iso_currency: The currency notation is ambiguous (e.g. just “$”). Please confirm the correct currency.
issues.missing_invoice_number: No invoice number was recognized. You can add it manually.
issues.missing_description: No service description was recognized. Briefly add what this is about.
issues.ambiguous_date_format: The date format is ambiguous (e.g. 03/04/2026). Please check the date.
issues.unclear_recipient_country: The recipient's country is unclear. Please select it – it affects VAT.
issues.unclear_business_status: It is unclear whether the recipient is a business. Please specify – it affects VAT.
issues.refund_detected: This looks like a credit note or refund. Please check direction and amounts.
issues.possibly_not_invoice: This document doesn't look like an invoice. Please check whether it belongs here.
issues.ocr_used: The text was read via OCR. Please review the recognized fields carefully.
issues.duplicate_detected: This document appears to have been imported before.
issues.possible_duplicate: Critical duplicate: this appears to match “{{filename}}” (same date, amount and party). Compare or merge the PDFs before confirming.
issues.missing_exchange_rate: An exchange rate for the foreign currency is missing. Enter the rate so EUR amounts can be calculated.
issues.password_protected: The PDF is password-protected. Remove the password and import it again.
issues.corrupt_pdf: The PDF is damaged and cannot be read. Re-export it and import it again.
issues.not_a_pdf: This file is not a PDF. Please import PDF files only.
issues.empty_pdf: The PDF contains no pages and cannot be processed.
issues.disk_space: Not enough free disk space. Free up space and try again.
issues.ocr_failed: Text recognition failed. You can enter the fields manually.
issues.rename_failed: The file could not be renamed. The document was saved anyway.
issues.interrupted: The import was interrupted. Please try again.
issues.internal_error: An internal error occurred. Please try again.
issues.invalid_payload: Invalid input. Please check the entered values.
issues.critical_issues: This document has critical issues and cannot be confirmed yet.
issues.merge_incompatible: Only active documents of the same type can be merged.
issues.merge_failed: The PDFs could not be merged. No source document was deleted.
issues.llm_disagreement: The AI double-check disagrees on “{{field}}”: suggestion “{{suggested}}”. Please review.

llm.queuedToast: AI check started. The result will appear on the document shortly.

reasons.recognized_payment_date: Payment date recognized from the document
reasons.recognized_invoice_date: Invoice date recognized from the document
reasons.method_unsure: Taxation method still unclear – Belegbar calculates cautiously

settings.title: Settings
settings.importHandlingDesc: Belegbar always stores its own verified copy. Copy keeps the source file; Move removes it only after the import succeeds.
settings.otherIncomeDesc: E.g. employment or rental – used for the income tax estimate.
settings.backupCreateDesc: Saves database and documents into a ZIP file.
settings.backupRestoreDesc: Replaces the current data with a backup.
settings.backupRestoreConfirmBody: The current data will be replaced by the backup. Belegbar will restart afterwards. It's best to create a fresh backup first.
settings.exportDesc: Exports documents and totals for a period.
settings.openDataFolderDesc: Shows the folder with database and documents.
settings.llmRemoveConfirmBody: The model will be deleted from disk and the AI double-check disabled. You can download the model again at any time.

onboarding.euerDesc: Income minus expenses – common for freelancers and small businesses.
onboarding.accrualDesc: Double-entry bookkeeping with a balance sheet – rather for larger businesses.
onboarding.unsureIncomeDesc: No problem – Belegbar cautiously assumes the cash-basis logic.
onboarding.filingQuarterlyDesc: VAT return per quarter – the most common.

tour.promptTitle: Would you like a short tour?
tour.optionFullDesc: 10 stops: everything important, including the document view.
tour.noDocumentNote: No document yet – stops about the document view are skipped.

dropzones.title: Import documents
dropzones.body: Just drop your invoice PDFs here – income on the left, expenses on the right. Belegbar reads everything else by itself.

attention.title: Needs your attention
attention.body: This is where you see what needs attention: documents to review, missing payment dates or exchange rates. One click takes you right there.

confirm.title: Review & confirm
confirm.body: Green means all good. A yellow circle is uncertain, a yellow triangle is a warning, and a red stop is critical. Use “Select” to confirm clean documents in one go.

taxesVat.title: VAT at a glance
taxesVat.body: Here you continuously see your estimated VAT payable for the selected period – including a traceable calculation.

taxesIncome.title: Income tax estimate
taxesIncome.body: Belegbar estimates profit, income tax and the suggested reserve from your documents – all estimates, not tax advice.

reviewSplit.title: The document view
reviewSplit.body: Recognized fields on the left, the original PDF on the right. Rarely needed fields are folded away under “More details”.

reviewRecheck.title: Re-read & AI check
reviewRecheck.body: “Re-read document” reads the PDF again. The optional AI check double-checks the recognized fields locally.

paymentActions.title: Record the payment
paymentActions.body: Set the payment date with one click – today, on the invoice date or freely chosen. Important for cash accounting.

settingsMethods.title: Your tax methods
settingsMethods.body: Change your VAT method and filing frequency here – Belegbar recalculates immediately.

settingsBackup.title: Backups
settingsBackup.body: Back up database and documents regularly as a ZIP file – everything stays local on your device.

pdf.loadError: The PDF could not be displayed.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.llm_not_ready: The AI model is not ready yet. Download it in Settings.
errors.llm_unsupported_ram: This device does not have enough memory for the local AI model.
errors.llm_unsupported_cpu: This device's processor does not support the local AI model.
errors.llm_download_failed: The model download failed. Check your internet connection and try again.
